behavior.logic_source: RULES_DOC (Attached 'rules' Google Doc) > ENH_30 (Forensic Structural Filter)
behavior.mandate_source: Refer to RULES_DOC (Attached 'rules' Google Doc) for all thresholds, and GEM_Rule_Enforcer_Engine for enforcement.

scope.dilution_risk: Monitor conversion floors and outstanding ATM (At-The-Market) capacity.
scope.warrants: Track exercise price vs. current price for 'Warrant Wall' detection.
scope.shelf_offerings: Monitor S-3/424B status for imminent secondary risk.

local_physics.sizing_modifiers: Reference RULES_DOC (Attached 'rules' Google Doc) > ENH_30 > structural_modifier_table (Canonical)
local_physics.warrant_magnet: IF Price > Warrant_Exercise_Price AND rVol > RVOL_CONFIRMATION (see RULES_DOC (Attached 'rules' Google Doc) > system_thresholds) THEN TAG 'Hedge-Related Selling Risk'

operations.action: Overwrite existing modifier (0.0-1.0) with calculated Structural_Modifier.
Append any triggered tags (e.g., 'Hedge-Related Selling Risk').

handoff_protocol.requirement: Structural inputs must be committed to SSoT before Validator execution.
